chunks.title: Arrival at Ziklag and Distress
chunks.reason: Describes the discovery of the burned city, the captivity of families, and David's emotional response.

chunks.title: Seeking Guidance and Departure
chunks.reason: David consults the priest via the ephod, receives divine instruction to pursue, and divides his forces at the brook Besor.

chunks.title: The Egyptian Guide and Victory
chunks.reason: Narrates finding an exhausted Egyptian slave who guides David to the Amalekite camp for a decisive victory.

chunks.title: Recovery of Spoil and Distribution Law
chunks.reason: Details the return of all captives and goods, followed by David's resolution to share spoils equally with those who stayed behind.

chunks.title: Distribution of Spoil to Elders
chunks.reason: Lists the specific cities and regions where David sent portions of the recovered spoil to his friends.
